data.title: OpenAI Taps Instacart CEO Fidji Simo As Chief Of Applications, Sam Altman To Focus On 'Research, Compute And Safety' Amid Superintelligence Push
data.description: OpenAI has appointed Instacart CEO Fidji Simo to the newly created role of CEO of Applications, reporting directly to Sam Altman as the artificial intelligence powerhouse restructures its leadership to prepare for future AI advancements.

data.title: Top 5 Commodity Futures to Trade Right Now
data.description: The top 5 commodity futures to trade right now including oil, gold, and natural gas. Learn what's driving the market in 2025.

data.title: ARM Says Tariffs Can't Touch Its Business As AI Boom Fuels Record Revenue: 'Can't Run AI Without ARM,' CEO Rene Haas Says
data.description: ARM Holdings executives reassured investors that the company's business model provides protection from direct tariff impacts amid growing U.S.-China trade tensions, according to its fourth quarter of 2025 earnings call.

data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Compares Trump's Crypto Policy To Mar-A-Lago Buffet: 'You Have To Eat Everything At The Table'
data.description: Anthony Scaramucci, founder of SkyBridge Capital, commented on President Donald Trump’s cryptocurrency policies, asserting that the healthy developments around legislation and regulatory clarity were marred by his family’s involvement in the space.

data.title: Apple Warns Of 'Hundreds Of Millions To Billions' Dollar Losses Over Epic Games Ruling, Seeks Stay Amid App Store Shakeup
data.description: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) has expressed apprehension over the potential financial consequences of a contempt ruling in favor of Epic Games. The tech giant has warned that this ruling could lead to "substantial" financial losses.
